samples.xml_description:
Implement 8-bit multiplication using shift and add. 8-bit input operand A. 8-bit input operand B. 16-bit output for the product. Multiplicand. Multiplier. Product of A and B.

Initialize

product = 0;

Iterate over each bit of

B

and add the shifted

A

to the product.

for (i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
            if (B[i] == 1) {
                product = product + (A << i);
            }
            A = A << 1;
        }
